mnemonics: CAPS For Cloud: Compute, API, Platform, Storage
S.P.A.M. For Security: Secure, Protect, Authenticate, Monitor
keyPoints: Cloud Architecture relies on virtualization and resource pooling for on-demand services.
Security is a shared responsibility model (Provider secures the infrastructure, user secures their data and access).
Key services include IaaS (Infrastructure), PaaS (Platform), and SaaS (Software).
commonMistakes: Assuming security is fully managed by the cloud provider (ignoring the shared responsibility model).
Not properly configuring access controls and storage permissions, leaving data publicly exposed.
